description: Deprecate the root back-compat symlinks (install -> .oh/install, scripts -> .oh/scripts) introduced in #321 by repointing every functional consumer to the real .oh/ paths, then removing the symlinks. Authoritative inventory: tasks/deprecate-oh-symlinks/blast-radius.md (Categories A-G + FORBIDDEN + verification).

userStories.title: T-A: Repoint build and test config
userStories.description: As the harness, I want the Makefile and vitest config to reference .oh/scripts directly so build/test work without the root symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: Makefile L9/L13/L53: scripts/docker-compose.sh and scripts/harness-config.sh repointed to .oh/scripts/...
vitest.config.ts L6 include is '.oh/scripts/__tests__/**/*.test.ts'
grep -n 'scripts/' Makefile shows only .oh/scripts/ paths
grep -n '"scripts/' vitest.config.ts returns empty
npx vitest run exits 0 (Typecheck passes)
ONLY Makefile and vitest.config.ts are modified by this story

userStories.title: T-B: Repoint devcontainer runtime boot path
userStories.description: As the sandbox boot path, I want entrypoint and compose to reference .oh/ directly so the container boots healthy without the root symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: entrypoint.sh L190/L194/L195 reference .oh/install/banner.sh (grep pattern + sourced path)
entrypoint.sh L320 guard and L337 tmux launch reference .oh/scripts/cron-runtime.ts
docker-compose.yml L64 healthcheck references /home/sandbox/harness/.oh/scripts/sandbox-healthcheck.sh; L14 comment updated
bash -n .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh exits 0
grep -n 'harness/scripts/\|harness/install/' .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh returns empty
grep -n '/home/sandbox/harness/scripts/' .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml returns empty
ONLY .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh and .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml are modified
userStories.notes: Parallel wave. Live boot path — verify with bash -n. Files: .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh, .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml.

userStories.title: T-CD: Repoint CI workflows and update eval probes atomically
userStories.description: As CI, I want workflow script paths/filters and the probes that assert them to reference .oh/ together so CI stays green and probes stay non-REGRESSION.
acceptanceCriteria: ci-harness.yml: shellcheck glob (L126) and pnpm-pin call (L136) use .oh/...; legacy 'install/**'/'scripts/**' filters removed (.oh/** already present)
release.yml: pnpm-pin (L65) and shellcheck (L81) use .oh/...
sandbox-boot-guard.yml: compose calls (L66,L71) + boot-smoke (L136) use .oh/scripts/...; path filters repointed to .oh/scripts/.../.oh/install/...
boot-lint-glob.sh L31/L51 use '.devcontainer/ .oh/install/ .oh/scripts/'
sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh assertions (L26,L37,L43) match the new .oh/ workflow strings
grep -n '"install/\*\*"' .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml .github/workflows/sandbox-boot-guard.yml returns empty
grep -n 'bash scripts/' .github/workflows/*.yml returns empty
bash evals/probes/boot-lint-glob.sh and bash evals/probes/sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh exit 0
ONLY the 3 workflow files and 2 probe files are modified
userStories.notes: Parallel wave. Coupled: edit workflows first, then probes to match. Re-read filter blocks before editing.

userStories.title: T-E: Repoint skills and crons that exec root paths
userStories.description: As a skill/cron running inside the sandbox, I want bare scripts/ exec forms repointed to .oh/scripts/ so they resolve without the root symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: Bare/$HARNESS/$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT exec+source forms of scripts/locked-append.sh, scripts/ralph.sh, scripts/ablate.sh, scripts/cron-runtime.ts repointed to .oh/scripts/... in: autopilot/SKILL.md, autopilot/autopilot-caps.sh, context-audit/SKILL.md, eval/run.sh, health-check/SKILL.md, retro/SKILL.md, crons/autopilot.md, crons/prompt-miner.md
${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/scripts/... references are NOT modified
crons/heartbeat.md is NOT modified (git diff --quiet crons/heartbeat.md)
bash -n .mifune/skills/autopilot/autopilot-caps.sh and bash -n .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh exit 0
ONLY the 8 listed files are modified
userStories.notes: Parallel wave. Do NOT touch ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/scripts or crons/heartbeat.md.

userStories.title: T-F: Repoint user-facing docs
userStories.description: As a self-hosting user, I want install/healthcheck commands in docs to use .oh/ so copy-paste works after the symlink is gone.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md L40/L48, docs/installation.md L25/L39/L54, docs/quickstart.md L30: 'bash scripts/install.sh' -> 'bash .oh/scripts/install.sh'
docs/installation.md L150: harness/scripts/sandbox-healthcheck.sh -> .oh/scripts/sandbox-healthcheck.sh
grep -n 'bash scripts/' README.md docs/installation.md docs/quickstart.md returns empty
grep -n 'harness/scripts/' docs/installation.md returns empty
ONLY README.md, docs/installation.md, docs/quickstart.md are modified
userStories.notes: Parallel wave. Files: README.md, docs/installation.md, docs/quickstart.md.

userStories.title: T-G: Update misc references (protected-paths, context, AGENTS)
userStories.description: As a contributor/orchestrator, I want protected-paths and context docs to name .oh/ paths so they stay accurate after removal.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/protected-paths.txt L45-46: install/banner.sh and install/cloudflared-tunnel.sh -> .oh/install/...
context/SOUL.md, context/TOOLS.md, context/REPO_MAP.md, AGENTS.md machinery-path mentions of scripts/ and install/ updated to .oh/... (or removed-symlink note dropped)
.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feat.md and skill.md area lists updated if they name these dirs
grep -n '^install/' .claude/protected-paths.txt returns empty
ONLY the listed files are modified

userStories.title: T-REMOVE: Remove symlinks, add CHANGELOG entry, final verification
userStories.description: As the harness, I want the two root symlinks removed and the full verification suite green so the migration is complete and durable.
acceptanceCriteria: Depends on US-001..US-006 all complete
Add exactly one new CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry (Removed/Changed); no history entries altered
git rm install scripts (symlink blobs removed; .oh/install and .oh/scripts untouched)
ls install scripts exits non-zero (No such file)
npx vitest run exits 0 (Typecheck passes)
for p in evals/probes/*.sh; do bash "$p"; done — no exit 1 (REGRESSION/FAIL)
bash .oh/scripts/docker-compose.sh config --quiet exits 0
bash -n .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh exits 0
git grep -nE '(^|[^.a-zA-Z/])(install|scripts)/' -- ':!CHANGELOG.md' ':!*.md' shows only .oh/-prefixed or intentional non-path prose
userStories.notes: SERIAL — runs only after the parallel wave. Files: install, scripts (removed), CHANGELOG.md.
